SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.allocation

Class ProductionAllocationResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.allocation.ProductionAllocationResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ProductionAllocationResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result of a linear production-allocation run: how much of each source ends up in each custody outlet, resolved per component and aggregated to product groups and mass/mole totals.

Allocations are stored on a molar basis (mole/sec) and converted on demand to mass-based units. The class supports per-stream, per-component and per-product-type queries, optional mass-closure renormalisation to measured (base-case) custody totals, and schema-versioned JSON export.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team
See Also:

    Gets the allocated flow of a single component from a source to a custody outlet.
    double

    Gets the allocated flow of a source to a custody outlet, summed over all components.

    Gets the allocation factor of a source to a custody outlet: the fraction of that source's total allocated production that is delivered to the outlet.

    Gets the master component slate.
    double
    getComponentRecoveryFactor(String custody, String component)
    Gets the recovery factor of a component at a custody outlet: the fraction of that component's total allocated flow (summed over all sources and all custody outlets) that is delivered to the given outlet.

    Gets the custody outlet names.

    Gets the total flow received by a custody outlet from all sources.

    Gets the per-component solver diagnostics.
    double
    getMaxResidual()
    Gets the worst (largest) relative residual across all component solves.
    double

    Gets the allocated flow of a source to all custody outlets of a given product category.
    double
    getProductTotal(ProductType productType, String unit)
    Gets the field-wide total flow delivered to all custody outlets of a given product category, summed over every source and component.

    Gets the source names.
    double

    Gets the total allocated flow of a source across all custody outlets.

    Renormalises each custody outlet so that the sum over sources of every component exactly matches a measured (or base-case) target, enforcing mass closure.

    Resolves a component name to its index, throwing if unknown.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProductionAllocationResult

      public ProductionAllocationResult(String[] sourceNames, String[] custodyNames, ProductType[] custodyTypes, String[] componentNames, double[] molarMass, double[][][] allocMole, List<LinearAllocationSolver.ComponentDiagnostics> diagnostics)
      Creates an allocation result.
      Parameters:
      sourceNames - source names; must be non-null
      custodyNames - custody outlet names; must be non-null
      custodyTypes - custody product categories; must be non-null and same length as custodyNames
      componentNames - master component slate; must be non-null
      molarMass - molar mass per component (kg/mol); must be non-null and same length as componentNames
      allocMole - allocated molar flow [source][custody][component] in mole/sec; must be non-null
      diagnostics - per-component solver diagnostics; must be non-null

  • Method Details

    • convert

      private double convert(double mole, int componentIndex, String unit)
      Converts a molar flow (mole/sec) of a single component to the requested unit.
      Parameters:
      mole - molar flow in mole/sec
      componentIndex - component index (for molar mass)
      unit - target unit (see getAllocatedFlow(String, String, String))
      Returns:
      the converted flow

    • getAllocatedFlow

      public double getAllocatedFlow(String source, String custody, String unit)
      Gets the allocated flow of a source to a custody outlet, summed over all components.
      Parameters:
      source - the source name; must exist
      custody - the custody outlet name; must exist
      unit - the target unit: mole/sec, mol/sec, mole/hr, mol/hr, kmole/hr, kmol/hr, kg/sec, kg/hr, kg/day or tonnes/year
      Returns:
      the allocated flow in the requested unit

    • getAllocatedComponentFlow

      public double getAllocatedComponentFlow(String source, String custody, String component, String unit)
      Gets the allocated flow of a single component from a source to a custody outlet.
      Parameters:
      source - the source name; must exist
      custody - the custody outlet name; must exist
      component - the component name; must be on the master slate
      unit - the target unit
      Returns:
      the allocated component flow in the requested unit

    • getProductAllocation

      public double getProductAllocation(String source, ProductType productType, String unit)
      Gets the allocated flow of a source to all custody outlets of a given product category.
      Parameters:
      source - the source name; must exist
      productType - the product category to sum over; must be non-null
      unit - the target unit
      Returns:
      the aggregated product flow in the requested unit

    • getSourceTotal

      public double getSourceTotal(String source, String unit)
      Gets the total allocated flow of a source across all custody outlets.
      Parameters:
      source - the source name; must exist
      unit - the target unit
      Returns:
      the total allocated flow in the requested unit

    • getCustodyTotal

      public double getCustodyTotal(String custody, String unit)
      Gets the total flow received by a custody outlet from all sources.
      Parameters:
      custody - the custody outlet name; must exist
      unit - the target unit
      Returns:
      the total custody flow in the requested unit

    • getProductTotal

      public double getProductTotal(ProductType productType, String unit)
      Gets the field-wide total flow delivered to all custody outlets of a given product category, summed over every source and component.
      Parameters:
      productType - the product category to sum over; must be non-null
      unit - the target unit
      Returns:
      the aggregated field product flow in the requested unit

    • getAllocationFactor

      public double getAllocationFactor(String source, String custody)
      Gets the allocation factor of a source to a custody outlet: the fraction of that source's total allocated production that is delivered to the outlet. The allocation factors of a source over all custody outlets sum to one.
      Parameters:
      source - the source name; must exist
      custody - the custody outlet name; must exist
      Returns:
      the dimensionless allocation factor in [0, 1], or 0.0 if the source allocates nothing

    • getComponentRecoveryFactor

      public double getComponentRecoveryFactor(String custody, String component)
      Gets the recovery factor of a component at a custody outlet: the fraction of that component's total allocated flow (summed over all sources and all custody outlets) that is delivered to the given outlet.

      For a gas/oil split this reproduces the classic component oil/gas recovery factor (ORF): the share of the component recovered in a particular product stream. The recovery factors of a component over all custody outlets sum to one.

      Parameters:
      custody - the custody outlet name; must exist
      component - the component name; must be on the master slate
      Returns:
      the dimensionless recovery factor in [0, 1], or 0.0 if the component is absent everywhere

    • renormalizeMassClosure

      public void renormalizeMassClosure(double[][] custodyComponentTargetMole)
      Renormalises each custody outlet so that the sum over sources of every component exactly matches a measured (or base-case) target, enforcing mass closure. Components whose modelled sum is zero are left untouched.
      Parameters:
      custodyComponentTargetMole - target molar flow [custody][component] in mole/sec; must be non-null and sized C x K

    • requireSource

      private int requireSource(String source)
      Resolves a source name to its index, throwing if unknown.
      Parameters:
      source - the source name
      Returns:
      the source index

    • requireCustody

      private int requireCustody(String custody)
      Resolves a custody name to its index, throwing if unknown.
      Parameters:
      custody - the custody outlet name
      Returns:
      the custody index

    • requireComponent

      private int requireComponent(String component)
      Resolves a component name to its index, throwing if unknown.
      Parameters:
      component - the component name
      Returns:
      the component index

    • getSourceNames

      public String[] getSourceNames()
      Gets the source names.
      Returns:
      a copy of the source name array

    • getCustodyNames

      public String[] getCustodyNames()
      Gets the custody outlet names.
      Returns:
      a copy of the custody name array

    • getComponentNames

      public String[] getComponentNames()
      Gets the master component slate.
      Returns:
      a copy of the component name array

    • getDiagnostics

      public List<LinearAllocationSolver.ComponentDiagnostics> getDiagnostics()
      Gets the per-component solver diagnostics.
      Returns:
      the diagnostics list

    • getMaxResidual

      public double getMaxResidual()
      Gets the worst (largest) relative residual across all component solves.
      Returns:
      the maximum residual, or 0.0 if there are no diagnostics

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Builds a schema-versioned JSON representation of the allocation result.

      The JSON contains the source totals, custody totals, the full source → custody allocation matrix (mole/sec and kg/hr), product-group summaries per source, and solver diagnostics.

      Returns:
      a pretty-printed JSON string
